message:
fix: move Role before Skills in template, rename skills tag

Two changes to prevent the coordinator from being primed into
implementer mode before it establishes its coordinator identity:

1. Template reorder: Role section now renders before Skills section.
   In the baseline prompt, the coordinator read its delegation role (41%)
   before seeing skill references (78%). The template engine flipped this
   — skills at 66%, role at 74%. The model read ops-task ("fix, build,
   configure") before knowing it was a coordinator, priming it to work
   directly. Confirmed via session interrogation: the model admitted
   "reading ops-task/SKILL.md likely pushed me toward a direct
   inspect/fix workflow."

2. Rename <skills> to <skill-catalog> to frame skills as a reference
   catalog rather than instructions to follow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
-{{ if .Skills }}<skills>
+{{ if .Skills }}<skill-catalog>
 {{ if .HasUseSkill }}Load a skill by calling use_skill with its name. The response includes the skill directory path for accessing scripts and other collateral.
 {{ else }}Load a skill by reading its SKILL.md file path with read_file. The skill directory may contain scripts and other collateral.
 {{ end }}{{ range .Skills }}{{ if $.HasUseSkill }}- {{ .Name }}: {{ .Description }} [{{ .Dir }}]
 {{ else }}- {{ .Name }}: {{ .Description }} [{{ .SkillFile }}]
-{{ end }}{{ end }}</skills>
+{{ end }}{{ end }}</skill-catalog>
 {{ end }}
\ No newline at end of file
